home.title: AISVS
home.subtitle: OWASP AI Security Verification Standard Tool
home.description: The AISVS tool provides a browser-based interface to assess your organization's AI security posture across 14 controls. With this tool, you can:

features.feature1: Assess your AI security practices across 14 controls
features.feature2: Visualize your AI security maturity with dynamic charts
features.feature3: Compare your results over time and get AI-powered analysis
features.feature1Desc: Evaluate AI security practices from training data to model governance.
features.feature2Desc: Generate radar and bar charts showing your posture across all 14 AISVS controls.
features.feature3Desc: Results are stored locally in JSON – private and never uploaded to any server.

home.privacy: Assessment responses can be saved to the user's local computer, in a JSON-formatted text file. Responses are retained only on the local system and are not shared with any other system or persons.
home.sammDescription: The OWASP Artificial Intelligence Security Verification Standard (AISVS) is an open framework for verifying the security of AI systems — including LLMs, agents, RAG pipelines, and model infrastructure.
home.sammPurpose: AISVS is designed to help organizations:

purposes.purpose1: Evaluate current AI security practices against industry standards;
purposes.purpose2: Build a structured AI security assurance program;
purposes.purpose3: Demonstrate measurable improvements over time; and
purposes.purpose4: Define and measure security activities across the AI lifecycle.

home.sammFlexibility: AISVS is flexible enough to be used by organizations of all sizes, for a single AI product or across an entire AI portfolio.

assessment.title: AISVS Assessment
assessment.loadPrevious: Would you like to use previous results to populate the questionnaire?
assessment.loadDescription: If you have a file of unfinished results that you wish to go back to you can upload them here and the questionnaire will autopopulate with your answers
assessment.clearConfirm: This will clear all answers do you wish to continue?

results.title: AISVS Assessment Results
results.completionText: Thank you for completing the questionnaire
results.mustComplete: You must first complete the questionnaire to see results
results.saveJson: Do you wish to save your results file in JSON?
results.loadPrevious: Do you wish to load your previous results to compare?
results.exportPdf: Do you wish to print or save the graphs as a pdf?
results.exportError: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.

upload.dropzone: Drag 'n' Drop some files here, or click to select files
upload.errorFormat: The file(s) you have uploaded aren't in JSON format. Please use only JSON collected from this tool

footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ by the OWASP Community

llm.apiKeyNote: Your key is encrypted with AES-GCM and stored only on this device.
llm.autoAnalysisDesc: Automatically generate AI analysis when viewing results.
llm.analyzePrompt: Click below to get a detailed AI analysis of your AISVS results with improvement suggestions.
llm.notConfigured: Configure an LLM provider in settings to enable AI analysis.
llm.decryptError: Could not decrypt API key. Please re-enter it in settings.
llm.comparisonNote: Analysis includes comparison with your previous AISVS assessment.
llm.providerChanged: new provider active — re-analyze to update
llm.pageSubtitle: Connect an LLM provider to get detailed analysis and improvement suggestions for your AISVS assessment results.
llm.pageDescription: Configure your LLM provider for AI-powered AISVS assessment analysis.
llm.noModelsFound: No models found for this provider.
llm.infoSecurityBody: API keys are encrypted with AES-GCM and stored only on this device. They are never sent to SAMMwise servers.
llm.infoProvidersBody: Anthropic (Claude), OpenAI (GPT), Google Gemini, and Ollama for fully local inference.
llm.infoPersistBody: Generated analysis is embedded in the JSON report file so it reappears when you import the report for comparison.

meta.description: OWASP AISVS Assessment Tool - Evaluate your organization's AI security posture across 14 controls
meta.keywords: owasp, aisvs, ai security, llm security, assessment, verification standard, artificial intelligence
